message:
fix(fcp-raptorq): use saturating conversion for repair symbol calculation

Fixes potential integer truncation when calculating repair symbols with
extreme input values:

- Before: Cast u64 to u32 directly, which could truncate on overflow
- After: Use `u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX)` to saturate

Added test `repair_symbols_saturates_on_extreme_values` that verifies:
- With max repair ratio (655%) and u32::MAX source symbols
- Result saturates to u32::MAX instead of wrapping to a small value

This prevents unexpected behavior when the calculated repair count
exceeds u32::MAX (~28 billion with extreme inputs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
